description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_HOST, and IMAGE_TAG variables. In the build stage add a build job that runs the global before_script (docker info and docker login) then executes docker build -f build.Dockerfile -t $IMAGE_TAG . and runs only for merge request pipelines. In the deploy stage add a pages job that also runs the before_script, builds the same image, runs a container to copy /build/public to a local public directory, stops and removes the container, and publishes the public folder as a pages artifact, triggering only on the master branch. In the deploy-azure stage add an azure job that runs on changes to src/Server/** or paket.lock on the master branch, runs the before_script, then builds a Docker image with docker build -f deploy.Dockerfile -t $IMAGE_TAG supplying Azure credentials via --build-arg AZ_PASS=$SECRET_AZ_PASS --build-arg AZ_USER=$SECRET_AZ_USER --build-arg AZ_TENANT=$SECRET_AZ_TENANT --build-arg AZ_RESOURCEGROUP=$SECRET_AZ_RESOURCEGROUP --build-arg AZ_FUNCTIONNAME=$SECRET_AZ_FUNCTIONNAME, preparing the image for deployment to Azure Functions.
